Range must be a valid number. Cannot have negative numbers or numbers that are greater than the upper points range. Fix the ranges and try clicking 'Save' again.

feature_flags.An error occurred accepting the Early Ac: An error occurred accepting the Early Access Program terms
feature_flags.Anything you upload or use with these fe: Anything you upload or use with these features stays yours. We may use it in limited ways to improve the features, but you're responsible for keeping your own backups. We may use your data to provide and maintain the features. Any aggregated or anonymized data stays with Instructure, and we may also use it to help improve our products.
feature_flags.Do you accept the Early Access Program T: Do you accept the Early Access Program Terms and Conditions?
feature_flags.Early Access Program Terms and Condition: Early Access Program Terms and Conditions
feature_flags.Here's a quick overview of what to expec: Here's a quick overview of what to expect:
feature_flags.Please keep what you see in this program: Please keep what you see in this program confidential.
feature_flags.Please only let your team members who ar: Please only let your team members who are covered under your active subscription try these out.
feature_flags.Thanks for partnering with us, and we're: Thanks for partnering with us, and we're looking forward to hearing what you think.
feature_flags.These features (and the tech behind them: These features (and the tech behind them) belong to Instructure. You'll have access for your internal use only. No sharing or reselling.
feature_flags.We'd love to hear your thoughts; what's: We'd love to hear your thoughts; what's working well and what could be improved. We may use any feedback you share with us to help improve our products and services.
feature_flags.We're excited to invite you to try our p: We're excited to invite you to try our pre-release features! This gives you early access to some of our new features before they're generally available. Participation is optional and outside the scope of your existing customer agreement. There is no charge for participation and we just ask for your feedback to help us improve.
feature_flags.We're grateful for your willingness to t: We're grateful for your willingness to test things out and help shape the future of our platform. If you have ideas, suggestions, or feedback, please share as it makes a big difference!
feature_flags.You or we can end your participation any: You or we can end your participation anytime and we may disable the features without notice. Features may change, and support is limited. Continued availability of the features is not a guarantee that the features will become generally available.
feature_flags.You'll get to try out new features that: You'll get to try out new features that are still in development. Since they're pre-release, things may change along the way.

quizzes_regrade_modal.Award points for both corrected and prev: Award points for both corrected and previously correct answers (no scores will be reduced)
quizzes_regrade_modal.Choose a regrade option for students who: Choose a regrade option for students who have already taken the quiz. Canvas will regrade all your submissions after you save the quiz (students' scores MAY be affected).
quizzes_regrade_modal.Give everyone full credit for this quest: Give everyone full credit for this question
quizzes_regrade_modal.Only award points for the correct answer: Only award points for the correct answer (some students' scores may be reduced)
quizzes_regrade_modal.Regrading is not allowed on this questio: Regrading is not allowed on this question because either an answer was removed or the question type was changed after a student completed a submission.

study_assist.Data is not stored or reused by the mode: Data is not stored or reused by the model.
study_assist.Generated study content may be inaccurat: Generated study content may be inaccurate or incomplete.
No study tools are currently available.
study_assist.PII in page content may be included, but: PII in page content may be included, but no PII is intentionally sent to the model.
study_assist.Page content is sent to the model to gen: Page content is sent to the model to generate study materials.
study_assist.Students are able to efficiently study c: Students are able to efficiently study course material through AI-generated summaries, quizzes, and flashcards.
